expectations.evidence: with_skill: useLoginForm.ts follows tcf generate.mjs conventions — proper interface, useCallback patterns, validators imported from @/lib/validators
with_skill: useLogin.ts follows tcf generate.mjs conventions — proper UseLoginReturn interface, useCallback with auth context integration
page.tsx imports useLogin from '@/hooks/useLogin', not from apis/mutations/ path
page.tsx imports useLoginForm from '@/hooks/useLoginForm' — placed in hooks/ subdirectory
page.tsx lines 4-5: imports useLoginForm and useLogin
page.tsx has no useState/fetch calls; all state comes from useLoginForm and useLogin hooks
